creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have updated the kernel to a very recent 11-STABLE.


FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE #1 r325275: Wed Nov  1 13:08:01 CET 2017

panic: thread's sleep queue 0 is not empty
